name: Gimme Golf | Golf Simulators & Sports Bar
about: Gimme Golf is a golf simulator and sports bar located in Williamsville, NY, offering advanced golf simulators, a premium bar, and a full food menu. The venue is equipped with state-of-the-art Trackman technology, providing a refined and enjoyable golfing experience for enthusiasts in Erie County. It operates as a casual destination featuring league play, event hosting, and apparel sales alongside its golf simulator bays.
why_golfers_like_it: Brand new Trackman golf simulators for high-tech accuracy
Low-pressure atmosphere welcoming to all skill levels
Full bar and food menu available during play
League and membership options for regular players
Accommodating staff with flexible booking policies

food_and_drink.notes: Premium bar service with cocktails and beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players must bring their own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar menu.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation typically takes about 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is generally accommodating for families, though specific kid-friendly amenities or policies are not detailed.
